emotional_tone: Premium, controlled, motivational, sharp, SaaS-grade, performance-focused

layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

surfaces_and_borders.tactical_button: bg-[#E50914] text-white font-bold tracking-widest uppercase px-6 py-3 hover:bg-[#B80710] transition-all border border-transparent hover:border-white/20
surfaces_and_borders.secondary_button: bg-transparent text-white border border-[#262626] hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-white/40 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold px-6 py-3

components_strategy.cards: Cardless layout or extreme flat cards. Use 1px #262626 solid borders. No drop shadows. Utilize 'border-collapse' style grids for metrics.
components_strategy.buttons: Sharp edges, uppercase typography, high contrast. Only use Primary (#E50914) for the main conversion/action.
components_strategy.inputs: Flat, background #121212, border #262626, white text. On focus, border turns #E50914. No rounded corners.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. Use #E50914 for active lines/bars, #262626 for gridlines, #A1A1AA for axis text.
components_strategy.tables: Dense, tech-focused. Hover effects on rows (bg-[#1A1A1A]). Align numbers to the right.
components_strategy.tabs: Underline style only. Active tab has #E50914 bottom border and white text. Inactive tabs are #71717A.

images.description: Athletic man working out in a modern gym, high contrast, used with a dark overlay
Dark abstract texture for section backgrounds or card overlays
Black athletic clothing for the gear recommendation card
Sprint track stadium at night for event mode

page_specific_guidelines.marketing_landing: High visual impact. Use the hero_background image with a bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 overlay. Large typography (Barlow Condensed). Sticky glass header. Feature bento grid using the texture_background for variety.
page_specific_guidelines.auth: Split screen layout. Left side: dark texture or event track image. Right side: minimalistic form, zero-radius inputs, primary action button. High-end SaaS feel.
page_specific_guidelines.dashboard_command_center: The 'Control Room' grid. Dense metrics. Top row: Readiness Score (large typography), Streak. Middle area: Today's Workout & Diet Plan side-by-side. Right column: Event countdown & Clothing recommendations.
page_specific_guidelines.onboarding_assessment: Step-by-step wizard. Clean, focused. Progress bar at the top using #E50914. Large readable questions.
page_specific_guidelines.daily_checklist: Tactical UI. Checkboxes must be square. Strikethrough text when checked, color shifts to #71717A.
page_specific_guidelines.workout_logging: Mobile-first view within the dashboard. Large tap targets for sets/reps. Timer component using mono font (JetBrains Mono).
page_specific_guidelines.progression_analytics: Utilize dark charts. Focus on the data. Minimal UIchrome around the charts.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Gray text (#71717A) must only be used for non-essential labels.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All interactive elements must have a visible focus state.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All buttons, inputs, tabs, and checklist items MUST include data-testid (e.g., 'data-testid="login-submit-button"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Rely on custom configured colors from this JSON.
Install and use 'lucide-react' or '@phosphor-icons/react' for icons.
Implement 'Barlow Condensed' for headings and 'Manrope' for body text via Google Fonts.
For the dashboard, use CSS Grid heavily. Avoid overusing flexbox for multi-dimensional layouts.
Never use pure black text or default borders. Always use the specified palette (#0A0A0A base, #262626 border).
Ensure the application is wrapped in a dark theme by default (e.g., `<html class='dark'>`).
Do not use generic placeholder images. ONLY use the URLs provided in the media section.
Build the dashboard using pure HTML/Tailwind for the grid structure, integrating Shadcn UI primitives only for complex interactions (dropdowns, dialogs, charts).
